calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-25-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID ROUDA FOR PLAINTIFF JAMES B DELMAN, ALSO PRESENT
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ORA PROCHNOVICK FOR DEFENDANT JANNE NOREM
DEFENDANT MAURICE I MOGANNAM ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT JOANNE NOREM TO VACATE PREMISES AT 2718 SUTTER BY MIDNIGHT 6/7/05. DEFENDANT NOREM TO PAY $2000 AS FOLLOWS: $100 BY 5PM 5/26/05; $100 ON 7/1/05 AND ON THE IST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL OTHER RENT AND DAMAGES. DEFENDANT AIVES A REFUND OF $2175 SECURITY DEPOSIT.JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED IMMEDIATELY WITH A STAY OF EXECUTION 6/8/05. IF DEFENDANT VACATES AND ALL PAYMENTS MADE, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. AS TO DEFENDANT MAURICE MOGANNAM, PLAINTIFF WILL VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND IMMEDIATELY FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
IF PAYMENTS NOT MADE PLAINTIFF MAY FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION WITH 24 HOURS NOTICE, FOR JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:ANDREW WESTLEY ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; JOANN BRYCE (218)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2005 Text Ruling
